title: Async Centrality & Chunked Processing
impact: Non-blocking graph analytics for large graphs with progress reporting and approximation mode

tasks.description: Add Chunked Processing to Betweenness Centrality - Modify calculateBetweennessCentrality to yield control periodically with progress callbacks
stepByStep: Modify method signature to accept options object instead of single topN parameter:
Destructure: const { topN = 10, chunkSize = 50, onProgress } = options;
Add 'processed' counter initialized to 0 before the main loop
Inside the main loop (after processing each source vertex):
At end of loop (before sorting results), call onProgress(1) if defined
acceptanceCriteria: Method yields control every chunkSize iterations
onProgress callback fires with 0-1 progress value

tasks.description: Add Approximation Mode for Betweenness - Add sampling-based approximation for faster results on large graphs
stepByStep: Add to calculateBetweennessCentrality options: approximate?: boolean; sampleRate?: number;
private sampleEntities(entities: Entity[], sampleSize: number): Entity[] {
At start of calculateBetweennessCentrality, after getting entities:
Use sourcesToProcess in the main loop instead of entities
After computing scores, if approximate: scale by 1/sampleRate

tasks.description: Update get_centrality Tool for New Options - Add approximate and sampleRate options to the tool schema and handler
stepByStep: approximate: { type: 'boolean', default: false, description: 'Use approximation for faster betweenness centrality' }
sampleRate: { type: 'number', default: 0.2, minimum: 0.01, maximum: 1.0, description: 'Sample rate for approximation' }
Destructure approximate and sampleRate from args
For betweenness case, pass: { topN, approximate, sampleRate }
In response, add: approximate: algorithm === 'betweenness' && approximate
acceptanceCriteria: get_centrality schema has approximate and sampleRate

tasks.description: Add Tests and Update Documentation - Add tests for chunked/approximation modes and update CLAUDE.md
stepByStep: Find or create describe('Betweenness Centrality') block
Add test: 'should yield control and report progress' - create graph, call with onProgress, verify progressCalls > 0
Add test: 'should produce same results with chunking' - compare results with and without chunkSize
Add test: 'should complete faster with approximation' - time comparison (can skip with it.skip for CI)
Add test: 'should produce reasonable estimates' - verify top entities similar to full computation
Find get_centrality documentation in Tool Categories section
Add note about approximate and sampleRate options
Add note about chunked processing for large graphs

notes: This sprint completes Phase 7 with async-friendly graph analytics. Chunked processing prevents UI freezing during long computations. Approximation mode trades accuracy for speed on very large graphs. These improvements are especially important for interactive use cases. IMPORTANT: The current method signature is 'calculateBetweennessCentrality(topN: number = 10)' - this needs to be changed to accept an options object. The current tool handler (toolHandlers.ts:438-439) calls it with 'calculateBetweennessCentrality(topN)' which will need updating to pass the options object.
